title: Ptychotis meisneri
taxonomy: Ptychotis meisneri is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is a flowering plant native to the island of São Tomé and Principe in the Gulf of Guinea. The plant is classified in the genus Ptychotis, which contains several species of plants native to tropical Africa. Ptychotis meisneri is a rare and endemic species, found only in a limited area of the island. Further classification of Ptychotis meisneri is not well-documented, but it is likely to be a member of the family Apiaceae, which includes a wide range of flowering plants.
